title: FamilyClusterRecord
description: A generation-like cluster of fermionic mode families produced by the Phase IV family clustering algorithm.

clusterId.description: Unique cluster identifier (conservative label, not a physical particle name)

memberFamilyIds.description: Fermion mode family IDs belonging to this cluster

clusteringMethod.description: Algorithm used to form this cluster

ambiguityScore.description: Ambiguity score for this cluster assignment [0, 1]. Higher = more uncertain.

isStableCluster.description: Whether the cluster assignment is stable (low ambiguity, consistent across branches)

featureVectorSummary.description: Summary of the feature vectors used to form this cluster

meanMassLikeScale.description: Mean mass-like invariant across cluster members

chiralProfile.description: Chirality profile summary: left-dominant, right-dominant, mixed, ambiguous

conjugationPattern.description: Conjugation pair pattern: paired, self-conjugate, unpaired, ambiguous

meanBranchStability.description: Mean branch stability across cluster members

couplingProfileLabel.description: Boson coupling profile label for this cluster

conjugateClusterId.description: Cluster ID of the conjugate partner cluster, if identified

ambiguityNotes.description: Ambiguity notes explaining uncertain cluster assignments
